prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Chrysler LA 340 (340ci, 5.6L V8, engine code: A-340)** with a forged rotating assembly from **SCAT Enterprises** (forged crankshaft, H-beam connecting rods, and forged pistons with a 10.5:1 compression ratio for boost readiness). Pair with a **Holley Sniper EFI 2x4 throttle body system** and **MSD Atomic EFI controller** for precise fuel and ignition mapping, replacing the stock carburetor.

Forced induction via a **Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger** (82mm compressor wheel) on a custom **Tial 44mm wastegate** and **Turbonetics Godzilla intercooler** (front-mount, 24x12x3.5" core). Boost pressure set to 12 psi with a **TurboSmart Kompact 50mm blow-off valve** and **ID1000x injectors** (1000cc/min) for E85 compatibility.

Suspension overhaul with **QA1 PRO Coil-Over System** (double-adjustable shocks, 2.5" diameter, 12-position rebound/compression damping) and **Hotchkis Sport Suspension Stage 2 kit** (front/rear sway bars, subframe connectors, and polyurethane bushings). Rear axle upgraded to a **Ford 9" differential** with **Truetrac limited-slip** and **3.91:1 gear ratio** for drag strip launches.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with integrated tow hooks, and rear ducktail spoiler) painted in **PPG Hemi Orange** with **3M Matte Black vinyl wrap** accents. Side skirts and rear diffuser from **AIT Racing** for aggressive stance.

Custom **Billet Specialties** hood (4" cowl induction scoop) with **AeroCatch hood pins** and **LED halo headlights** (Hella 500 series) replacing the stock sealed beams. Rear taillights replaced with **Oracle Lighting LED sequential units** (red/amber, DOT-approved).

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Recaro SRD seats** (fixed-back, FIA-approved) and **Schroth 6-point harnesses**. Dashboard replaced with a **Momo Prototipo steering wheel** (350mm, quick-release hub) and **AEM X-Series digital dash** (7" display, boost/fuel pressure/AFR monitoring). Roll cage by **Chassisworks** (8-point, mild steel, bolt-in) with **Sparco harness bar** for rigidity.
